channel.title: Shaurya · Log
channel.description: A personal activity log and curiosity journal.

item.title: Grokking, physics, and a two-month detour
item.description: Testing whether grokking finds the true physical law, and why weight decay turned out to be exactly the wrong tool for the job.

item.title: On keeping a log instead of a blog
item.description: Why lowering the bar for publishing raised the rate of thinking.

item.title: Terminal UIs are underrated
item.description: Notes from building with Textual for three months.

item.title: A week with no syntax highlighting
item.description: An experiment in reading code the way you read prose.

item.title: Things I learned migrating two drives
item.description: File systems, regret, and the archaeology of old projects.

item.title: Reading list, annotated
item.description: Short notes on everything I finished this year.
